task_completion.description: Verify that PDFs are configured to download instead of opening natively in Chrome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Site Settings > PDF documents), the option 'Download PDFs' should be selected instead of 'Open PDFs in Chrome'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory is set to the Prepress Spool and the prompt to ask where to save is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Downloads), the 'Location' must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Prepress_Spool' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned on.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific GPU acceleration flags are enabled for 3D web proofing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'chrome://flags' page, the flags 'GPU rasterization' (enable-gpu-rasterization) and 'Override software rendering list' (ignore-gpu-blocklist) must be shown as 'Enabled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom site search engine for Pantone is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings (Manage search engines and site search), there should be a Site Search entry with the keyword 'color' and a URL containing 'pantone.com/color-finder'.

task_completion.description: Verify the professional bookmarks are organized into the four specified folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark Bar or Bookmark Manager must display exactly these four folders: 'Web-to-Print MIS', 'Color Management', 'Asset Libraries', and 'Equipment Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify all personal and entertainment bookmarks have been completely deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmark Bar and Bookmark Manager must show NO bookmarks or folders related to entertainment or social media (e.g., Netflix, Facebook, ESPN, X/Twitter, Hulu).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser interface (Settings pages, chrome://flags, Bookmark Manager) rather than terminal windows editing JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent organized existing bookmarks rather than just creating empty folders.
integrity.visual_evidence: If a bookmark folder is shown open or the Bookmark Manager is visible, the folders should contain actual bookmark links, not be completely empty.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just write a text file claiming the task is complete.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the Chrome browser reflecting the required state, not a text editor or terminal outputting a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected download directory: /home/ga/Documents/Prepress_Spool. Required GPU flags: 'enable-gpu-rasterization' and 'ignore-gpu-blocklist'. Expected bookmark folders: 'Web-to-Print MIS', 'Color Management', 'Asset Libraries', 'Equipment Support'. Banned personal bookmark domains to check for deletion: netflix.com, facebook.com, espn.com, x.com, twitter.com, hulu.com. Custom search keyword: 'color' pointing to 'pantone.com/color-finder'.
